data.title: Qualitas Real Estate Income Fund Declares November 2025 Distribution
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium and Invest with Confidence

  • Unlock hedge-fund level data and powerful investing tools designed to help you make smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis so your portfolio is always positioned for maximum potential

An announcement from Qualitas Real Estate Income Fund Units ( (AU:QRI) ) is now available.

The Qualitas Real Estate Income Fund announced a distribution for November 2025 of 0.9207 cents per unit, translating to a 7.00% annual return based on a net tangible asset value of $1.60 per unit. This distribution reflects the fund’s ongoing commitment to providing stable returns to its investors, reinforcing its position in the real estate investment market and highlighting its role in offering attractive risk-adjusted investment opportunities.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:QRI) stock is a Buy with a A$1.60 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Qualitas Real Estate Income Fund Units stock, see the AU:QRI Stock Forecast page.

More about Qualitas Real Estate Income Fund Units

Qualitas Real Estate Income Fund (QRI) is an investment trust that aims to provide monthly income and capital preservation by investing in real estate loans secured by first and second mortgages, primarily in Australia. Managed by QRI Manager Pty Ltd, a subsidiary of Qualitas Group, the fund benefits from Qualitas’ extensive experience in real estate private credit and equity, offering diverse investment solutions to institutional, wholesale, and retail clients.

Average Trading Volume: 942,735

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$1.11B

Rox Resources Limited ( (AU:RXL) ) has provided an announcement.

Rox Resources Limited announced a change in the director’s interest, specifically involving Mr. David Boyd. The change involved a transfer of 500,000 fully paid ordinary shares between direct and indirect holdings, with no net change in the total holdings controlled by Mr. Boyd. This adjustment in shareholding structure is part of routine administrative updates and does not affect the company’s overall operations or market positioning.

data.title: Apiam Animal Health Announces Court-Approved Shareholder Meeting for Acquisition Vote
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium and Invest with Confidence

  • Unlock hedge-fund level data and powerful investing tools designed to help you make smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis so your portfolio is always positioned for maximum potential

Apiam Animal Health Ltd. ( (AU:AHX) ) has provided an announcement.

Apiam Animal Health Ltd. has announced that the Supreme Court of New South Wales has approved the convening of a shareholder meeting to consider a proposed acquisition by Pepper Bidco Pty Ltd and Pepper Holdco Limited, entities controlled by Adamantem Capital Fund II. The acquisition, structured as a scheme of arrangement, would see BidCo acquire 100% of Apiam’s shares. The Independent Expert’s Report, included in the Scheme Booklet, deems the scheme fair and reasonable, recommending shareholders vote in favor. The Apiam Independent Board Committee and directors also support the scheme, which is expected to be voted on in February 2026.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:AHX) stock is a Hold with a A$1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Apiam Animal Health Ltd. stock, see the AU:AHX Stock Forecast page.

More about Apiam Animal Health Ltd.

Apiam Animal Health Ltd. operates in the veterinary services industry, providing animal health services and products. The company focuses on delivering comprehensive veterinary services to production and companion animals across Australia.

Average Trading Volume: 387,408

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$158.7M

data.title: ECP Emerging Growth Ltd. Announces Special Dividend Linked to DRP Participation
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium and Invest with Confidence

  • Unlock hedge-fund level data and powerful investing tools designed to help you make smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis so your portfolio is always positioned for maximum potential

ECP Emerging Growth Ltd. ( (AU:ECP) ) has issued an update.

ECP Emerging Growth Ltd. has announced a special dividend of 10 cents per share, contingent on achieving 80% participation in its Dividend Reinvestment Plan (DRP). This initiative aims to reward long-term shareholders and efficiently utilize the company’s substantial franking credit balance without impacting its regular dividend payments or diminishing the company’s size. The company encourages shareholders to opt into the DRP to benefit from the franking credits, which can reduce double taxation and potentially offer cash refunds for zero-tax investors. The special dividend underscores the flexibility and control provided by ECP’s LIC structure, enhancing shareholder value.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:ECP) stock is a Hold with a A$1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on ECP Emerging Growth Ltd. stock, see the AU:ECP Stock Forecast page.

More about ECP Emerging Growth Ltd.

ECP Emerging Growth Ltd. operates in the financial sector, focusing on active investment strategies. The company offers a Listed Investment Company (LIC) structure, which provides distinct advantages over open-ended investment vehicles like managed funds or ETFs. ECP’s market focus is on delivering value to shareholders through strategic initiatives such as dividend payments and leveraging franking credits.

Average Trading Volume: 23,302

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

An update from Australian Potash Limited ( (AU:APC) ) is now available.

Australian Potash Limited has announced a pro-rata renounceable entitlement offer to raise approximately $1,384,776.
